name: Lemon Drops
recipeInstructions:
------------------------LEMON GLAZE------------------------
1/4 cup Confectioner's sugar
2 tablespoons Fresh lemon juice
Preheat oven to 350°F. Line cookie sheets with parchment paper or butter them. Cream together the butter and confectioner's sugar in a large bowl using an electric mixer until smooth. Add the egg yolk, 2 tablespoons of fresh lemon juice, and lemon zest; beat until well combined. Gradually add the flour and mix until the dough is smooth and well blended. Form the dough into 1-inch balls and place them about 2 inches apart on the prepared sheets. Flatten each ball slightly with the bottom of a glass dipped in granulated sugar to prevent sticking.
Bake the cookies in the middle of the oven for about 13 minutes, or until they are barely golden brown. Remove from the oven and let cool completely on wire racks. Once cooled enough to handle, dip the top of each cookie into the lemon glaze made with 1/4 cup confectioner's sugar and 2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice. Allow the cookies to cool completely before storing them in airtight containers for up to 1 week or in the freezer for up to 2 months.
